description: Reorder user-defined ACL rules on a site.

local.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = json.dumps({
  "orderedAclRuleIds": [
    "string"
  ]
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("PUT", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules/ordering", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Reorder User-Defined ACL Rules
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules/ordering"
    method: PUT
    body:
      orderedAclRuleIds:
        - string
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = json.dumps({
  "orderedAclRuleIds": [
    "string"
  ]
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("PUT", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules/ordering", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Reorder User-Defined ACL Rules
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules/ordering"
    method: PUT
    body:
      orderedAclRuleIds:
        - string
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
